metadata.description: Official marketplace for Hyperflow: issue-to-reviewed-PR multi-agent orchestration, 22 specialists, lean mode, local visual artefacts, project memory

plugins.name: hyperflow
plugins.description: Point it at a GitHub issue, get back a reviewed PR. Adaptive multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Grok, Antigravity, and Cursor. Inline-fast for proven 1-2 file fixes; Worker to Reviewer for the rest. Lean mode default, local visual artefacts and ROI dashboard, project memory that stays in your repo.
